content: agent1: working on NDCG IDCG fix in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py. Will touch NDCG class only.

agent1: ack - I fixed the IDCG bug in NDCG.compute (metrics.py) to use len(expected_ids) instead of min(len(retrieved),len(expected)). Pushed to team/agent1. Please rebase/merge on top of that so our changes to NDCG.compute combine cleanly.

agent1: merged your graded-relevance change with my IDCG fix. Resolved by keeping your ideal_relevances/relevance_of logic but iterating idcg over len(expected_ids) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) - that min() was the original bug. Pushed to team/agent1, all your relevance_scores tests + the ndcg tests pass except one pre-existing test that encoded the old buggy min() behavior (expected in this task).
